tasks.step: Audit existing tag filter implementation (src/api/notes.ts:17-20); establish green baseline
tasks.notes: Handler logic correct: (a) filters by n.tags.includes(tag) when tag param provided, (b) returns all notes when ?tag= omitted, (c) returns empty array when no match. Existing tests confirm all three cases work. No implementation fix needed. Tag param validation not required: any string is valid, empty/missing correctly skips filter, includes() comparison has no injection surface. Baseline: 21 tests passing, all green.

tasks.step: Add comprehensive tag filtering tests (match-only, empty-on-no-match, no-param=all, empty-string param, case-sensitivity)
tasks.notes: Added 5 new test cases inside describe('GET /api/notes'): (1) match-only excludes non-matching, (2) empty array+200 on no match, (3) omitting tag= returns all, (4) empty-string tag= returns all, (5) case-sensitivity. All 25 tests pass.

tasks.step: Set feature_list.json passes:true and run quality gates (test/lint/build)
tasks.notes: Set passes:true. Quality gates: build clean, lint clean, 25/25 tests pass.
VERIFY PASSED. build: clean. lint: clean. tests: 25/25 passed (2 suites). No regressions. feature_list.json passes:true.
